Dear Connection,

Share your updated CV to suma.talenttap@gmail.com. 
Mention Position name in subject.

🚀 We’re Hiring | Junior Backend Developer 🚀
 📍 Location: Bangalore
🏢 About Talme Technology
 Talme Technology is an emerging, technology-driven company focused on building modern web applications and digital solutions. We promote a learning-oriented culture with strong mentorship, hands-on exposure, and opportunities to work on live projects. Our mission is to help young developers build solid technical foundations while delivering high-quality software.
💻 Role: Junior Backend Developer
 We are looking for a Junior Backend Developer who is passionate about backend development and eager to learn and grow. You will work closely with senior developers to build, maintain, and enhance backend services, APIs, and databases.
🔧 Key Responsibilities
Assist in developing and maintaining backend applications
Write clean, efficient server-side code
Work with databases to store and retrieve data
Build and test REST APIs
Debug issues and fix bugs under senior developer guidance
Collaborate with frontend and QA teams
✅ Required Skills & Qualifications
Basic understanding of backend development concepts
Knowledge of Python / Node.js / Java
Familiarity with REST APIs
Basic knowledge of SQL / MySQL
Understanding of Git version control
🎓 Experience
6 months to 1 year of experience
Hands-on exposure to Python, JavaScript, AWS, MySQL

allContacts.summary: Hiring a React.js Developer for an on-site role in Infopark, Kochi. Requires 2 to 5 years of experience in building scalable, high-performance web applications with React.js. The ideal candidate should have strong proficiency in JavaScript, experience with React workflows (Flux/Redux), RESTful APIs, and Git. Experience with AI projects and backend technologies (Node.js, Express) is a plus.
allContacts.postText:
We are #hiring React.js Developers.! 
#reactdeveloper #reactjs 
Location - Infopark, Kochi (Onsite)

We are seeking a highly skilled React.js Developer with at least 2 years to maximum 5 years of professional experience in building and maintaining scalable, high-performance web applications. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in React.js and related modern front-end technologies, along with a keen eye for detail, clean coding practices, and a passion for delivering outstanding user experiences.

Job Description:
- Strong proficiency in JavaScript, including DOM manipulation and the JavaScript object model
- Developing new user-facing features using React.js
- Building reusable components and front-end libraries for future use
- Translating designs and wireframes into high quality code
- Experience with popular React.js workflows (such as Flux or Redux)
- Familiarity with RESTful APIs
- Experienced in version control tools like GIT and ticket tracking platforms like Redmine, Backlog, etc.
- Must have good analytical skills and problem-solving skills
- Ability to work independently

 Required Skills/Experience:
- Experience in working with AI projects.
- Basic knowledge of backend technologies (Node.js, Express, etc.).
- Familiarity with version control systems (Git, GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket).
- Optimize application performance and troubleshoot UI/UX issues across multiple devices and browsers.
- Knowledge in UI/UX design will be an add-on
- Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code following best practices.
- Stay up-to-date with the latest trends and advancements in JavaScript, React, and front-end development.

Interested candidates can share your resumes to hrindia@dooth.com

#kochihiring #developerhiring #infoparkjobs #kochicareers #hiringalert #reactdeveloperopening
